ablation.noise_features: none — all features contribute or are neutral

remaining_steps.step_20: Gate 2 decision — ship Stage 1 or escalate
remaining_steps.steps_22_24: Export JS forward pass, verify parity

gate_2_assessment.verdict: Below target. Options: try Stage 2 (25K params), or adjust threshold/features.
gate_2_assessment.note: 77.3% precision with 4.5% stuck class ratio is reasonable. The low stuck ratio means many 'easy' productive windows inflate FP count. On stuck-enriched subsets, precision would be higher.
